prestazioni: Engine swap to a **GM LS7 (7.0L V8, LS7 engine code)** with forged internals (Mahle pistons, Callies crankshaft, Manley H-beam rods) and a **Harrop HTV2300 supercharger** (2.3L rotor, 12 psi boost) paired with a **Holley Dominator EFI** standalone ECU for precise fuel and ignition mapping.

Full **custom 4-inch stainless steel exhaust system** by **Burns Stainless** (equal-length headers, merge collectors, and dual 3.5-inch outlets) with **Borla Pro XS mufflers** for optimized scavenging and a 300-cell **MagnaFlow catalytic converter** to maintain emissions compliance while maximizing flow.

Suspension overhaul with **Öhlins TTX46 coilovers** (3-way adjustable, 24-position rebound, 22-position compression) and **H&R anti-roll bars** (25mm front, 22mm rear) paired with **Whiteline adjustable end links** and **SuperPro poly bushings** for chassis rigidity and precise cornering.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V2 widebody kit** (custom-fitted for the SRV8 Concept) with **carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser** (all fabricated by **Seibon Carbon**) to accommodate the **20x11.5 ET25 front and 20x12.5 ET30 rear wheels** (Forgeline GA3R in matte bronze).

**Custom LED lighting system** by **Lux HID** (sequential turn signals, DRLs integrated into the front bumper, and **Osram 6000K HID projectors** with **Morimoto FX-R 3.0 lenses** for aggressive beam pattern).

**Full interior carbon fiber overhaul** by **VIS Racing** (dashboard, door cards, and center console wrapped in **3K twill weave carbon fiber**) with **Recaro Pole Position seats** (alcantara/leather, FIA-approved) and a **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel** (flat-bottom, suede grip) for track-focused ergonomics.
